# SolutionTemplate

> Pre-built solution template for quick start

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| name | string | yes | - | Template name |
| description | string | yes | - | Template description |
| category | customer-support \| data-analysis \| content-generation \| code-review \| custom | yes | - | Template category |
| config | json | yes | - | Default solution configuration |
| isPublic | boolean | yes | true | Whether template is publicly visible |
| author | string | yes | - | Template author |
| downloads | integer | yes | 0 | Number of times cloned |
| rating | float | yes | 0 | Average user rating |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/solution-template` — List all
- `POST /api/solution-template` — Create
- `GET /api/solution-template/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/solution-template/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/solution-template/:id` — Delete
